mapper.select: SELECT topic_id, topic_name, category, result_form, max_capacity, status, create_time FROM topic_library ORDER BY topic_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic_library WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topic_library(topic_name, category, result_form, max_capacity, status, create_time) VALUES(#{topicName}, #{category}, #{resultForm}, #{maxCapacity}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as open_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as closed_count FROM topic_library WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT t.topic_id, t.topic_name, t.category, t.result_form, t.max_capacity, t.status, t.create_time FROM topic_library t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT topic_id, COUNT(*) AS occupied_cnt FROM thesis_application WHERE application_status IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY topic_id ) occ ON t.topic_id = occ.topic_id WHERE t.status = 'open' AND (t.max_capacity - COALESCE(occ.occupied_cnt, 0)) > 0 ORDER BY t.topic_id
